question: Which of the following is NOT a recommended response to an active shooter incident? (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Pages 3 and 4)
canonical_answer:
-Look for a place to hide or an area that can be barricaded
-Look for possible escape routes from the area
-Find something solid to dive behind
-Provide instructions to arriving emergency response personnel (correct)
-If necessary, actively resist the perpetrator-

appears_in.title: Antiterrorism Level 1 Awareness Pre Test
appears_in.answer: Provide instructions to arriving emergency response personnel

appears_in.title: Antiterrorism Level 1 Jko
appears_in.answer: Provide instructions to arriving emergency response personnel

appears_in.title: Antiterrorism Scenario Training Page 2
appears_in.answer:
